# Prabal Banerjee — Personal Website

## About
Prabal Banerjee is the Co-Founder of Avail (https://www.availproject.org/), a modular blockchain infrastructure project focused on data availability. He is a former Lead Researcher at Polygon and a PhD dropout from the Cryptology and Security Research Unit at the Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata.

## Research Interests
- Blockchains
- Interoperability
- Data availability
- Fairness
- Symmetric key encryption

## Key Publications
- Cumulus: Blockchain-Enabled Privacy-Preserving Data Audit in Cloud (Distributed Ledger Technology, 2025)
- Accelerated Verifiable Fair Digital Exchange (Distributed Ledger Technology, 2023)
- Strategic Analysis of Griefing Attack in Lightning Network (IEEE TNSM, 2023)
- Chrisimos: A useful Proof-of-Work for finding Minimal Dominating Set (IEEE TrustCom, 2023)
- Blockchain Enabled Data Trading with User Consent (COMSNETS, 2021)
- Reliable, Fair and Decentralized Marketplace for Content Sharing Using Blockchain (IEEE Blockchain, 2020)
- Time is Money: Countering Griefing Attack in Lightning Network (IEEE TrustCom, 2020)
- Content Distributed Over Secure Channels (US Patent, 2021)

## Experience
- Co-Founder at Avail (2023–present)
- Lead Researcher at Polygon (2020–2023)
- Multiple research internships at IBM Research India, Xoken Labs, Oracle, Jadavpur University (2015–2018)

## Education
- PhD Student in Computer Science, Indian Statistical Institute Kolkata (2016–2020)
- MSc in Computer Science, Chennai Mathematical Institute (2014–2016)
- BSc (Hons) Computer Science, St. Xavier's College Kolkata (2011–2014)
